I want to find single behaviors that

If you have lots of leverage, then it

If you go to bed on time,
it's less likely that you'll get mugged,
it's less likely you'll be in a car

these downstream impacts from one single
behavior. And you also have better
quality sleep in general if you go to
sleep at the same time every day over
and over again. So, that means that you

years later, people are like, "Wow, you
look so good for your age." There's all
of these things from one central
behavior, which is just [ __ ] go to
bed on time. And so, if you want the
action for this, you set your alarm for
when you go to bed, not for when you
wake up. If you set your alarm for when
you go to bed, you will always be able
to wake up naturally at whatever time
you wake up, and it's very difficult to
oversleep when you go to bed at 9:00
because you can get 8 hours of sleep and
still be up by 5.
